title: pyrethrum canescens
intro: Pyrethrum canescens, also known as the 'woolly pyrethrum', is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of pyrethrum canescens include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce fever, and even serve as a natural insecticide. In traditional herbal preparations, pyrethrum canescens is often used to make topical creams and ointments that are applied directly to affected areas.
